AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOITON FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS; FILED BY PLAINTIFF EGC FINANCIAL, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY HEARING SET FOR FEB-28-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS EGC FINANCIAL, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S AMENDED MOTIONFOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 14, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 28, 2013 AT 4:00 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PLAINTIFF EGC FINANCIAL, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE EVIDENCE OF THE SUBSTANCE OF THE MATTERS "DEEMED ADMITTED." IN ANY EVENT, THE MOTION APPEARS TO BE A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, NOT A MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS, AND IT IS NOT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 437C. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Off Calendar Jun-17-2013 Continued To Jun-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

Ntc Of Motion And Order For Permission To Coordinate; Attachments
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Text Ruling

Ntc Of Mtn For Permission To Coordinate Attachments
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MICHAEL OCHOA's Motion For Permission To Coordinate Attachments is Denied without prejudice. If defendant is seeking to submit a petition for coordination to the chair of the judicial council, this motion must be filed in Department 206. If defendant is seeking to consolidate cases 522119 and 526521 pursuant to CCP 1048, his moving papers have failed to show good cause for consolidation. In any event, no proof of service on the opposing parties is attached to the motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Amended Notice Of Motion And Moiton For Judgment On The Pleadings;
Off Calendar Mar-14-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF EGC FINANCIAL, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Denied. Plaintiff failed to provide evidence of the substance of the matters "deemed admitted." In any event, the motion appears to be a motion for summary judgment, not a motion for judgment on the pleadings, and it is not in compliance with CCP 437c. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Amended Notice Of Motion And Moiton For Judgment On The Pleadings;
Off Calendar Feb-28-2013 Continued To Mar-14-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS EGC FINANCIAL, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S Amended MotionFor Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to March 14, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of its motion to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 28, 2013 at 4:00 pm, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Elizabeth McDonald, appearing for the Plaintiff and Moving Party;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The tentative ruling is modified as follows: PLAINTIFF EGC FINANCIAL, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted is continued to January 10, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. No later than 4 p.m., January 4, 2013, the moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date of January 10, 2013, or the motion will be denied.
